message:
fix(newproj): use safe arithmetic increment to avoid set -e issues

Changed ((completed++)) to if-then increment pattern to avoid potential
exit when completed is 0 (bash arithmetic returns exit code 1 for
expressions evaluating to 0).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -146,7 +146,9 @@ render_progress_screen() {
     local total=${#STEP_ORDER[@]}
     local completed=0
     for step in "${STEP_ORDER[@]}"; do
-        [[ "${STEP_STATUS[$step]}" == "success" ]] && ((completed++))
+        if [[ "${STEP_STATUS[$step]}" == "success" ]]; then
+            completed=$((completed + 1))
+        fi
     done
 
     # Progress bar
